title: Small Handhelds
description:
Makes items held in a hand smaller and therefore less obstructive. All items, blocks, weapons and tools in the game are supported. 
Now configurable with Respackopts!
body:
# Welcome to Small Handhelds! This resource pack makes items held in hand smaller, which makes the items obstruct your view way less than before. This pack supports everything and is compatible from 1.13 up to the latest Minecraft version! And trust me, once you have played with this resource pack, you don't want to go back ;) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/811a4efdeffa6396847306584578e6769259c0fd.gif) ## Versions ## V4.0+ Supports all blocks, items and weapons & tools, but now you can configure this pack to your liking!
**Configuration only available by installing the [Respackopts mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/b400f1a5cfa65d6547b7a1a498ea25287a5b9388.gif) ## V3.6 and below ### Full Version Supports all items, weapons, tools and blocks in the game ### Standard Weapons & Tools For players who don't like the smaller weapons and tools, this version supports smaller items and blocks but will leave the weapons and tools as the vanilla size ## Comparison ### Totem of Undying & Golden Carrot #### Smaller Handhelds ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/2bf54a3116a7d5ea6d7206da218da2141327a50d.png) #### Vanilla ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/6fe316d63e6092ffa940412db4c7355e5ad9f3a3.png) ### Potion & Firework Rocket #### Smaller Handhelds ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/fe78688ba0edbb27591e775c6f02de8320b1ab79.png) #### Vanilla ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/27a48898a74756f926c6603b6a763e2b1cd83e63.png) ### Sword & Shield Blocking #### Smaller Handhelds ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/187ad98526b164769469a10408779d381efb7db4.png) #### Vanilla ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyIFl8AF/images/8ecb6a054e3f5c351fa4ff3b4a9dfd29f1cd281c.png)
